=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (12:35-12:44) TS377088: This generator applies the same inline `Effect.mapError(...)` to every yielded effect. Keep that `Effect.mapError(...)` inline and hoist it once to the generator result: `Effect.gen(...).pipe(Effect.mapError(...))`, or `Effect.fn(function*(){ ... }, Effect.mapError(...))`. effect(redundantMapError)
  Fix 0: "Disable redundantMapError for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable redundantMapError for entire file"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable redundantMapError for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable redundantMapError for entire file" ===
skipped by default
